name: CPI Inflation
description: The Consumer Price Index measures the average change in prices paid by households for a fixed basket of goods and services. It is India's headline inflation number and the RBI's primary policy target, with a medium-term goal of 4%, within a 2-6% tolerance band.
source: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI)
releaseSchedule: Released monthly, typically around the 12th, for the previous month.

chart.title: CPI inflation, year-on-year
chart.subtitle: Headline consumer price inflation, % change, monthly
